title: Firebinds
description: Simple Keybinds for the DiamondFire MC server
body:
Adds Keybinds for DiamondFire Commands.

Can also be used for the controlify radial menu
Currently the defaults for keybinds are set to a large value. This is to be compatible with controlify, since a keybind has to be bound to add it to the radial menu. If this causes any issues, you can unbound the keys with Esc

Current List:
 - Go to spawn
